docs.title: Getting Started
docs.blurb: What Haven is, how to make an account, how to submit your first system, and how to find your way around. Five-minute read. Start here if you've never used Haven before.

docs.title: For Civilization Leaders
docs.blurb: If you run a No Man's Sky community and you're thinking about bringing your members into Haven as a recognized civilization, this is for you. What you'd be adopting, what you'd control, what you wouldn't, and what we'd ask of you.

docs.title: Under the Hood
docs.blurb: How Haven actually works. The mapping pipeline, the approval workflow, glyph and portal coordinate decoding, region naming, and every piece of community-contributed math that makes the platform tick.
